aria_keyboard_handler_exists.0: Interactive WAI_ARIA UI components must provide keyboard access
aria_keyboard_handler_exists.potential_no_keyboard_access: Verify the <{0}> element with "{1}" role has keyboard access

aria_role_valid.0: ARIA roles must be valid for the element to which they are assigned
aria_role_valid.Fail_1: The ARIA role '{0}' is not valid for the element <{1}>

style_color_misuse.0: Combine color and descriptive markup to convey information
style_color_misuse.Potential_1: Verify color is not used as the only visual means of conveying information

widget_tabbable_exists.0: Component must have at least one tabbable element
widget_tabbable_exists.fail_no_tabbable: Component with "{0}" role does not have a tabbable element

element_tabbable_unobscured.0: When an element receives focus, it is not entirely covered by other content
element_tabbable_unobscured.potential_obscured: Confirm that when the element receives focus, it is not covered or, if covered by user action, can be uncovered without moving focus

element_tabbable_visible.0: A tabbable element should be visible on the screen when it has keyboard focus
element_tabbable_visible.potential_visible: Confirm the element should be tabbable and if so, it becomes visible when it has keyboard focus

target_spacing_sufficient.0: The target must be sufficiently sized or spaced from other targets
target_spacing_sufficient.potential_overlap: Ensure the overlapped target "{0}" meets a minimum target size or has sufficient spacing from the overlapping target "{1}"

text_contrast_sufficient.0: The contrast ratio of text with its background must meet WCAG AA requirements
text_contrast_sufficient.fail_contrast: Text contrast of {0} with its background is less than the WCAG AA minimum requirements for text of size {1}px and weight of {2}

input_label_exists.0: Each form control must have an associated label
input_label_exists.Fail_1: Form control element <{0}> has no associated label
input_label_exists.Fail_2: Form control with "{0}" role has no associated label

aria_descendant_valid.0: Browsers ignore the explicit and implicit ARIA roles of the descendants of certain elements
aria_descendant_valid.potential_child_implicit_role: The element with role "{0}" contains descendants with implicit roles "{1}" which are ignored by browsers

aria_hidden_nontabbable.0: A hidden element should not contain any tabbable elements
aria_hidden_nontabbable.Fail_1: Element "{0}" should not be focusable within the subtree of an element with an 'aria-hidden' attribute with value 'true'

aria_id_unique.0: The ARIA property must reference a non-empty unique id of an existing element that is visible
aria_id_unique.Fail_1: The 'id' "{0}" specified for the ARIA property '{1}' value is not valid

label_name_visible.0: Accessible name must match or contain the visible label text
label_name_visible.Fail_1: Accessible name does not match or contain the visible label text

aria_form_label_unique.0: Each element with "form" role must have a unique label that describes its purpose
aria_form_label_unique.fail_label_not_unique: Multiple elements with "form" role do not have unique labels

svg_graphics_labelled.0: A non-decorative SVG element must have an accessible name
svg_graphics_labelled.fail_acc_name: The SVG element has no accessible name

text_sensory_misuse.0: Instructions should be meaningful without relying solely on shape, size, or location words
text_sensory_misuse.potential_other: Confirm the user instruction is still understandable without the word(s) '{0}'
text_sensory_misuse.potential_position: Confirm the word(s) '{0}' of the user instruction is used to indicate a logical rather than visual position
